title: eusebeo #2151
definition:
1) to act piously or reverently
    1a) towards God, one's country, magistrates, relations, and all to
        whom dutiful regard or reverence is due
nasbUsage:

    1a) towards God, one's country, magistrates, relations, and all to

    NASB:  to show piety towards:
